title: Mesyuarat Agung Tahunan 2025 — Bersama Kita Berdiri
excerpt: On 25 September 2025, the Tonggak gathered at MAJAPAHIT in Kuala Lumpur for KOPIT's fourth Annual General Meeting. Members reviewed the cooperative's first operational year, voted on the year ahead, and shared field updates — from the Suzhou China Exhibition to the digital reserve era. Quiet, deliberate, and above all collegial, the meeting reaffirmed the cooperative's founding principle: bersama kita berdiri — together, we stand.
author: Chairman's Office

title: After the Resolutions — Hi-Tea, Conversation, and a Lucky Draw
excerpt: Once the gavel fell on the formal session, MAJAPAHIT's hi-tea began. Members lined the buffet, traded notes from the year, and — when the Lucky Draw began — broke into the kind of applause cooperatives are built on. Three prizes, three handshakes: the Third (100 ADA), the Second (0.04 ETH), and the headline prize (0.002 BTC). Small wins, shared. The conversation continued well into the afternoon.
author: Chairman's Office

title: 团圆 (Tuán Yuán) — Reunion Dinner 2024
excerpt: On 30 January 2024, the cooperative gathered for its first Reunion Dinner — a Lunar New Year tradition reimagined in KOPIT's own form. Red lanterns hung above the tables; pineapple cookies stacked beside cups of tea. Between courses, a 15% dividend was proposed for 2023 (subject to SKM approval), AI and Robotics ventures were introduced, and the year ahead was sketched out in seven project areas. The cooperative ate, drank, and pencilled in its plans — together. 财源滚滚 — may wealth roll in, members.
author: Chairman's Office

title: KOPIT Explores RIMS Collaboration with Medical Industry
excerpt: On 27 March 2023, KOPIT met online with a medical industry player to explore developing a Regulatory Information Management System (RIMS) — the cooperative's first technology engagement with the healthcare sector. The meeting, attended by the Chairman, Secretary, Board members and the project lead, opened the door to a potential partnership.
author: Chairman's Office

title: ANGKASA Holds Information Session for Prospective Members
excerpt: On 21 March 2023, Chairman Michael Ong and director Jim Lim attended ANGKASA's briefing for prospective member cooperatives at Sani Hotel Kuala Lumpur — KOPIT's first step into the National Cooperative Movement of Malaysia, three months after registering with SKM.
author: Chairman's Office

title: KOPIT Rings in the Chinese New Year — A Joyful Dinner
excerpt: On 16 January 2023, weeks after registering with SKM, KOPIT members gathered at Veg Fish Farm Thai Restaurant for a Chinese New Year Eve dinner. 新年快乐 — and a strong start to the year ahead.
author: Chairman's Office

title: Mesyuarat Agung Pertama — KOPIT's Founding AGM
excerpt: On 10 November 2022, twenty-five founding members convened online — with Suruhanjaya Koperasi Malaysia observing — to vote KOPIT into existence. Seven weeks later, the cooperative was officially registered with SKM.
author: Chairman's Office

title: Officially Registered with SKM
excerpt: On 29 December 2022, KOPIT was officially registered with Suruhanjaya Koperasi Malaysia under subsection 7(1) of the Akta Koperasi 1993 — registration number 20227140122. This certificate is the legal foundation that allows KOPIT to hold member capital, issue shares, and operate as a cooperative under Malaysian federal law.
author: Chairman's Office

title: Board Attends SKM Cooperative Development Seminar
excerpt: On 26 May 2023, the KOPIT board attended the Seminar Pembangunan Koperasi Baharu Wilayah Persekutuan 2023, hosted by Suruhanjaya Koperasi Malaysia. Chairman Michael Ong led the delegation, joined by Treasurer Erica Hou and Secretary Ting Chun Sik. The two-day seminar covered cooperative governance, digital management platforms (INFOKOOP, E-SISPRO, EASY-COOP), and financing facilities — strengthening KOPIT's regulatory and operational foundation in its first year as a registered cooperative.
author: Chairman's Office

title: Board Reviews Projects and Future Direction
excerpt: On 13 April 2023, the KOPIT Board of Directors convened to review operational progress and financial allocation. The full board reviewed early-stage work on smart-home solutions and web development, alongside the cooperative's financial position. Discussion focused on disciplined deployment of capital and identifying next-phase opportunities for collaboration and growth — laying the groundwork for the projects that would shape KOPIT's first operational year.
author: Chairman's Office
